name: Digest long emails with Google Sheets and Microsoft Teams

parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf06635-document`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Detect Sentiment

### Detect Sentiment

Scores the text's sentiment; ports fire positive / neutral / negative.

Ports: ①→ Escalate Negative — Microsoft Teams · ②→ Log Neutral Feedback · ③→ Thank the Sender

### OpenAI Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `gpt-4o-mini`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Detect Sentiment** as `languageModel`

🔑 OpenAI API key

### Escalate Negative — Microsoft Teams

microsoftTeams — `chatMessage` operation against the connected account.

Next: Collect All Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Log Neutral Feedback

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Collect All Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Thank the Sender

microsoftTeams — `chatMessage` operation against the connected account.

Next: Collect All Outcomes

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Collect All Outcomes

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

# Digest long emails with Google Sheets and Microsoft Teams

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Digest long emails with Google Sheets and Microsoft Teams. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual document search is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Detect Sentiment → Escalate Negative — Microsoft Teams → Collect All Outcomes

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating document search in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Saves hours of manual work each week
- Standardizes the process every time
- Removes copy-paste errors

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2 / service account; Microsoft OAuth2; OpenAI API key.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your document search process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
